title: oerstedella tetraceros
intro: Oerstedella tetraceros, also known as the St. John's wort of the Pacific, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the Pacific Islands and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is valued for its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress, and its extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Oerstedella tetraceros include infusions and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
